name: Project Scanner
description: Scan ~/work/ for directories containing features.db. Return list of project paths with basic metadata (name from directory, db path). Handle missing/unreadable databases gracefully with warning flag.

name: Database Reader
description: Read SpecFlow SQLite database to extract features list and stats. Import from SpecFlow database module or implement compatible read-only queries. Return typed Feature[] and FeatureStats.

name: HTTP Server
description: Bun native HTTP server with routes: GET / (landing), GET /project/:name (detail), GET /api/projects (JSON), GET /api/project/:name (JSON). Serve static assets. Handle 404s. Print localhost URL on start.

name: Landing Page
description: HTML page showing project cards in a grid. Each card displays: project name, progress bar, X/Y features complete, last activity timestamp. Cards link to project detail. Include refresh button.

name: Phase Visualization Component
description: Reusable HTML/CSS component showing 4-step phase progress: SPECIFY -> PLAN -> TASKS -> IMPLEMENT. Steps are gray (not reached), yellow (current), or green (complete). Self-explanatory for demo viewers.

name: Project Detail Page
description: HTML page showing feature table for a project. Columns: ID, Name, Phase (using visualization component), Status (color-coded badge). Back link to landing. Refresh button. Handle unknown project gracefully.

name: CLI Command
description: Add 'specflow ui' command to SpecFlow CLI. Options: --port (default 3000). Starts server, prints URL. Standard error if port in use. Add --help documentation.
